seoTitle: Lake Burrendong vs Lake Cathie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Burrendong and Lake Cathie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Burrendong vs Lake Cathie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Burrendong and Lake Cathie.
heading: Lake Burrendong vs Lake Cathie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Burrendong, New South Wales and Lake Cathie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Burrendong has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Lake Cathie (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Burrendong or Lake Cathie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Burrendong has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Lake Cathie scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Burrendong scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Cathie scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Burrendong or Lake Cathie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Burrendong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
